title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: IONE ADVOCACY CENTER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer domestic violence and sexual abuse support groups, including bilingual support groups. 365 W 3rd Street Ione, OR 97843 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 9:30am-3:30pm by appointment only (541) 276-3322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-3322 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: 1st and 3rd Tuesday of the month Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLASSES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - TRAINING WORKSHOPS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADVOCACY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IONE ADVOCACY CENTER
